---
title: "Projects"
---

Below are the active and completed research projects from the Pichugin Lab. Code repositories for each project are hosted in our [GitHub organization](https://github.com/Pichugin-Lab).



## Active Projects

### Antigenic Surveillance of Plasmodium falciparum parasites

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**Status:** Active  
**Collaborators:** [Names]  
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
[{{< fa brands github >}} Repository](https://github.com/Pichugin-Lab){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-dark}
[{{< fa file-lines >}} Preprint](#){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

---



## Linking External Repositories

This lab website is designed to link directly to other repositories within the [Pichugin-Lab GitHub organization](https://github.com/Pichugin-Lab). As new repositories are made public they will be featured here with descriptions, documentation links, and usage examples.
